message: Takashima-san, who was doing something so lewd just a second ago, had returned to the normal Takashima-san, as if the film had been rewound.
I got caught up in my delusions again.
My face was red from the vulgar delusion.

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What's wrong? You got really quiet for a long time. I..."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, sorry... I was thinking about something."
